name: kesha-voice-kit
title: Kesha Voice Kit
description: Offline microphone dictation powered by the Kesha Voice Kit CLI. Records locally, transcribes locally, and copies text to your clipboard.
author: drakulavich

commands.name: dictate-to-clipboard
commands.title: Dictate to Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Kesha Voice Kit
commands.description: Record from the default microphone, transcribe locally with Kesha Voice Kit, and copy the transcript to the clipboard.

preferences.name: keshaBinPath
preferences.title: `kesha` Binary Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the `kesha` CLI. Leave blank to auto-detect common global install locations.

preferences.name: maxRecordingSeconds
preferences.title: Max Recording Seconds
preferences.description: Maximum microphone recording duration before the command stops automatically.
